en.summary: A clearer first-run and application model now connects themes, companions, runtime state, and recovery, while both creative workspaces gain professional history, validation, and compact-window behavior.
highlights: One persistent configuration dock shows the selected theme, independent companion, runtime state, and safest next action without duplicating Apply controls across pages.
The setup guide now keeps its steps and actions visible while theme and companion choices scroll inside a compact, keyboard-friendly workspace.
Theme Editor adds undo and redo, current-versus-saved preview, runtime control coverage, real scene-layer management, and explicit dirty-draft navigation.
Companion Studio adds automatic source detection, compiled-output readiness, source-project editing, and observable cancellable restoration for large drafts.
fixes: Fixed compact dialogs and creator workspaces clipping navigation or primary actions instead of scrolling only their working content.
Fixed reset actions becoming indistinguishable icon-only controls at narrow widths.
Fixed large companion drafts appearing frozen while several full-size cleanup buffers were processed at once.
Fixed partially decoded or cleaned draft frames retaining temporary object URLs after cancellation or failure.
Fixed theme drafts being easy to leave without a clear save, discard, or continue-editing decision.

zh-CN.summary: 更清晰的首次使用与应用模型现在统一呈现主题、独立伙伴、运行状态和恢复操作；两个创作工作区也补齐了专业的历史、校验与紧凑窗口体验。
highlights: 统一的当前搭配栏会持续显示主题、独立伙伴、运行状态和最安全的下一步，不再在多个页面重复出现应用按钮。
设置引导在紧凑窗口中固定步骤与操作，只让主题和伙伴选择区域滚动，并保持完整键盘操作。
主题编辑器新增撤销重做、当前与已保存版本对比、运行时映射说明、真实场景图层管理和未保存离开确认。
伙伴工作室新增自动素材识别、编译输出检查、源工程编辑，以及面向大型草稿的可观察、可取消恢复流程。
fixes: 修复紧凑窗口中的引导弹窗和创作工作区裁掉步骤或主要操作，而不是仅滚动中间内容的问题。
修复窄窗口下两个重置操作退化成难以区分的纯图标按钮。
修复大型伙伴草稿同时处理多个完整像素缓冲区时看似卡死的问题。
修复草稿恢复取消或失败后，部分解码和清理帧残留临时对象 URL 的问题。
修复主题草稿离开时缺少明确保存、放弃或继续编辑决策的问题。
